history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized blue character profile screen shows a gaming avatar area with multiple badges, ranks, and labeled achievements.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a blue-themed profile interface featuring a central character illustration of a person with blue hair and an ornate outfit, alongside a profile information panel that includes an avatar thumbnail, an ID line, and several rank and achievement icons.

Setting:
This appears to be a digital UI screen (likely a game profile page) with a dark-to-light blue gradient background and decorative lighting effects, with no real-world physical setting shown.

Visual Details:
The background is a smooth gradient from deep blue to lighter blue with faint stars and a circular glow behind the character. At the top left there is a small rectangular thumbnail image with a thick border. Near the top center-left, text and icons appear over the blue background, including a small badge icon and several small circular indicators. Mid-left shows a large gold emblem labeled “Rank Saat Ini,” followed by smaller icon-like graphics. Mid-right shows a gold crest with a number “30” beneath it and a label “Rank Tertinggi.” Lower sections contain two large emblem icons with labels “Man of Steel” and “Hand Over Fist.” At the bottom area, there are three small circular face icons in a row, and a line of text reading “Pengunjung Terakhir” near the lower left. To the bottom right of “Pengunjung Terakhir,” there are three small square thumbnails arranged horizontally. The camera view is a straight-on screenshot of the entire interface.

Visible Text:
PROFIL
keicyy`
ID: 1️⃣9️⃣0️⃣0️⃣97 (16113)
33
Tanah Sereal No.41 Kagura
starrj•esrt
Rank Saat Ini
30
Rank Tertinggi
Man of Steel
Hand Over Fist
Pengunjung Terakhir
Total F

Practical Summary:
The image is a screenshot of a blue game-style “PROFIL” page with a character illustration and multiple stats. It includes rank and achievement labels, visitor thumbnails, and an ID line with icons.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
